item.title: Battle of the Bulge in the Frozen Ardennes
item.description: Explore the Battle of the Bulge, set in the frozen Ardennes, highlighting harsh winter conditions, strategic challenges, and the bravery of soldiers in this pivotal WWII conflict.

media:content.media:title: Battle of the Bulge in the Frozen Ardennes
media:content.media:description: Explore the Battle of the Bulge, set in the frozen Ardennes, highlighting harsh winter conditions, strategic challenges, and the bravery of soldiers in this pivotal WWII conflict.

item.title: How Veterans Flushed Out German Snipers
item.description: WWII veterans recount tactics used to locate and eliminate German snipers, highlighting strategy, teamwork, and the dangers faced on the battlefield.

media:content.media:title: How Veterans Flushed Out German Snipers
media:content.media:description: WWII veterans recount tactics used to locate and eliminate German snipers, highlighting strategy, teamwork, and the dangers faced on the battlefield.

item.title: Roy Gleason: From MLB to Military Service
item.description: Learn about Roy Gleason’s journey from playing Major League Baseball to serving in the military, highlighting his career, challenges, and dedication to service.

media:content.media:title: Roy Gleason: From MLB to Military Service
media:content.media:description: Learn about Roy Gleason’s journey from playing Major League Baseball to serving in the military, highlighting his career, challenges, and dedication to service.

item.title: Veteran Reflection
item.description: Hear a veteran reflect on their military service, sharing personal experiences, lessons learned, and the impact of their time in uniform on life afterward.

media:content.media:title: Veteran Reflection
media:content.media:description: Hear a veteran reflect on their military service, sharing personal experiences, lessons learned, and the impact of their time in uniform on life afterward.

item.title: What Really Happened at Iwo Jima
item.description: Explore the true events of the Battle of Iwo Jima, featuring firsthand accounts, strategies, and the experiences of soldiers during this pivotal WWII conflict.

media:content.media:title: What Really Happened at Iwo Jima
media:content.media:description: Explore the true events of the Battle of Iwo Jima, featuring firsthand accounts, strategies, and the experiences of soldiers during this pivotal WWII conflict.

item.title: A Close Call in Service
item.description: Hear a veteran recount a near-death experience during military service, highlighting bravery, quick thinking, and the challenges faced in critical moments.

media:content.media:title: A Close Call in Service
media:content.media:description: Hear a veteran recount a near-death experience during military service, highlighting bravery, quick thinking, and the challenges faced in critical moments.

item.title: The Hardest Part for Combat Medics
item.description: Explore the challenges faced by combat medics, highlighting the emotional and physical difficulties of providing medical care in dangerous, high-pressure situations.

media:content.media:title: The Hardest Part for Combat Medics
media:content.media:description: Explore the challenges faced by combat medics, highlighting the emotional and physical difficulties of providing medical care in dangerous, high-pressure situations.

item.title: B-17 Flying Fortress vs Nazi Germany
item.description: Experience the story of the B-17 Flying Fortress as it took on missions against Nazi Germany, showcasing bravery, strategy, and historical significance.

media:content.media:title: B-17 Flying Fortress vs Nazi Germany
media:content.media:description: Experience the story of the B-17 Flying Fortress as it took on missions against Nazi Germany, showcasing bravery, strategy, and historical significance.

item.title: Combat Story: I Fired Twice
item.description: A veteran shares a firsthand account of a critical combat moment, explaining the decisions and intensity of battlefield experiences.

media:content.media:title: Combat Story: I Fired Twice
media:content.media:description: A veteran shares a firsthand account of a critical combat moment, explaining the decisions and intensity of battlefield experiences.
